p.c: function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B])

not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B]) or (B.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) })
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B]) or trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) = B.0

not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B]) or forall(x0: A, x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) } = true

(forall(x0: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B]) or forall(x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B]) or trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) })

not (B.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B])

not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) } or trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) != B.0 or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B])

trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) != B.0 or exists(k0: A, k1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0 + k1) != trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k1) } or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B])
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](A.0)
not (B.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) })
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0 + x1) = trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](x1) } or trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) != B.0
trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](A.0) != B.0 or exists(k0: A, k1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0 + k1) != trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k1) }
exists(k0: A, k1: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0 + k1) != trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k1) }
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](w0 + k0) != trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](w0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](k0) } }
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](w0)
let w1: A satisfy { trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](w0 + w1) != trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](w0) + trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](w1) }
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](w0 + w1)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1) { T0.0 = trivial_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](w1)
function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[B](trivial_add_monoid_hom[A, B](w1))
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]) { AddMonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) = Option.some[AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) }[A, B](f)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]) { AddMonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) = Option.some[AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) }[A, B](g)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != Option.some[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }[AddMonoidHom[A, B]](g, f)
not forall(x0: A) { f.hom(x0) = g.hom(x0) } or g.hom != f.hom
not forall(x0: A) { f.hom(x0) = g.hom(x0) } or g != f
g.hom != f.hom or exists(k0: A) { f.hom(k0) != g.hom(k0) }
let w0: A satisfy { f.hom(w0) != g.hom(w0) }
exists(k0: A) { f.hom(k0) != g.hom(k0) }
let w0: A satisfy { f.hom(w0) != g.hom(w0) }
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](f.hom)
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or (B.0 = f.hom(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) })
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or f.hom(A.0) = B.0
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } = true
(forall(x0: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or forall(x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) = f.hom(x0 + x1) })
not (B.0 = f.hom(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom)
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } or f.hom(A.0) != B.0 or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom)
f.hom(A.0) != B.0 or exists(k0: A, k1: A) { f.hom(k0 + k1) != f.hom(k0) + f.hom(k1) } or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]) { is_add_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[A, B](f)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]) { is_add_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[A, B](f)

goal: f.hom(A.0) = B.0 and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) }

p.c: function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](f.hom)
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or (B.0 = f.hom(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) })
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or f.hom(A.0) = B.0
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } = true
(forall(x0: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or forall(x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) = f.hom(x0 + x1) })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom) or f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) = f.hom(x0 + x1) })
not (B.0 = f.hom(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom)
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } or f.hom(A.0) != B.0 or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom)
f.hom(A.0) != B.0 or exists(k0: A, k1: A) { f.hom(k0 + k1) != f.hom(k0) + f.hom(k1) } or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](f.hom)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) } = true }(a)
function(x0: A, x1: A) { f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) = f.hom(x0 + x1) }(a, b)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](A.0)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T1](identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[A, A](a.add, b)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, A, A](identity_fn[A], a.add, b)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](a)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](b)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[A, A](identity_fn[A])
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A]) or (A.0 = identity_fn(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) })
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A]) or identity_fn(A.0) = A.0
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A]) or forall(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) } = true
(forall(x0: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A]) or forall(x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A]) or identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) = identity_fn(x0 + x1) })
not (A.0 = identity_fn(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A])
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) } or identity_fn(A.0) != A.0 or is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A])
identity_fn(A.0) != A.0 or exists(k0: A, k1: A) { identity_fn(k0 + k1) != identity_fn(k0) + identity_fn(k1) } or is_add_monoid_hom[A, A](identity_fn[A])
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](A.0)
not (A.0 = identity_fn(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) })
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0 + x1) = identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) } or identity_fn(A.0) != A.0
identity_fn(A.0) != A.0 or exists(k0: A, k1: A) { identity_fn(k0 + k1) != identity_fn(k0) + identity_fn(k1) }
exists(k0: A, k1: A) { identity_fn(k0 + k1) != identity_fn(k0) + identity_fn(k1) }
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { identity_fn(w0 + k0) != identity_fn(w0) + identity_fn(k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { identity_fn(w0 + w1) != identity_fn(w0) + identity_fn(w1) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { identity_fn(x0) + identity_fn(x1) = identity_fn(x0 + x1) }(w0, w1)

goal: is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f) = (f(B.0) = C.0 and forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) })

p.c: function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[C, B](f)
not is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f) or (C.0 = f(B.0) and forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) })
not is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f) or forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) } = true
(forall(x0: B) { not is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f) or forall(x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: B) { forall(x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) } = true })
not (C.0 = f(B.0) and forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f)
not forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) } or f(B.0) != C.0 or is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f)

goal: is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](g) = (g(A.0) = B.0 and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) })

p.c: function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](g)
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](g) or (B.0 = g(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) })

not (B.0 = g(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](g)
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) } or g(A.0) != B.0 or is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](g)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B, C](f, g, A.0)

goal: compose[A, B, C](f, g)(a + b) = f(g(a + b))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B, C](f, g, a + b)
is_add_monoid_hom[A, B](g)
B.0 = g(A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) }
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) } = true)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { g(x0 + x1) = g(x0) + g(x1) } = true }(a)
function(x0: A, x1: A) { g(x0) + g(x1) = g(x0 + x1) }(a, b)
is_add_monoid_hom[B, C](f)
C.0 = f(B.0) and forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) }
(forall(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) } = true)
function(x0: B) { forall(x1: B) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) } = true }(g(a))
function(x0: B, x1: B) { f(x0) + f(x1) = f(x0 + x1) }(g(a), g(b))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B, C](f, g, a)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B, C](f, g, b)

goal: compose[A, B, C](f, g)(a + b) = compose[A, B, C](f, g)(a) + compose[A, B, C](f, g)(b)
compose[A, B, C](f, g)(A.0) = C.0 and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g)(x0 + x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g)(x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g)(x1) }

p.c: exists(k0: A, k1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, k0 + k1) != compose[A, B, C](f, g, k0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, k1) }
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, w0 + k0) != compose[A, B, C](f, g, w0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { compose[A, B, C](f, g, w0 + w1) != compose[A, B, C](f, g, w0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, w1) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) }(w0, w1)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.0) = T0.0 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) }) = is_add_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[C, A](compose[A, B, C](f, g))

not is_add_monoid_hom[A, C](compose[A, B, C](f, g)) or (C.0 = compose[A, B, C](f, g, A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) })
not is_add_monoid_hom[A, C](compose[A, B, C](f, g)) or forall(x0: A, x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) } = true
(forall(x0: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, C](compose[A, B, C](f, g)) or forall(x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not is_add_monoid_hom[A, C](compose[A, B, C](f, g)) or compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) })

not (C.0 = compose[A, B, C](f, g, A.0) and forall(x0: A, x1: A) { compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0 + x1) = compose[A, B, C](f, g, x0) + compose[A, B, C](f, g, x1) }) or is_add_monoid_hom[A, C](compose[A, B, C](f, g))

goal: exists(k0: AddMonoidHom[A, A]) { AddMonoidHom.new[A, A](identity_fn[A]) = Option.some(k0) }
